name: Microsoft AI for Manufacturing Masterclass: Data to Impact
description:
Manufacturing is evolving rapidly, driven by data, AI, and intelligent automation. Organizations that harness these technologies effectively are leading the next wave of innovation and efficiency. In this LIVE masterclass, explore how Microsoft AI solutions unify data, enable real-time insights, and power key scenarios like smart factories, predictive maintenance, and supply chain optimization.
**Date:** May 07, 2026
**Time:** 10AM- 12PM EST
**[Click Here to Register for the Session](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/microsoft-ai-for-manufacturing?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes&utm_term_product=vendor_microsoft)**
You’ll gain practical insights, real-world use cases, and a clear understanding of how to implement AI across your manufacturing operations. Walk away with actionable strategies to improve efficiency, reduce downtime, and drive measurable business impact.
**NOTE: "ALL REGISTRATIONS WILL BE PROVIDED WITH DIGITAL ACHEIVEMENT BADGES ISSUED DIRECTLY FROM MICROSOFT"**
**What you will learn:**

* Introduction & Manufacturing Challenges
* Microsoft AI Ecosystem (Azure, Dynamics 365, Power Platform, Fabric and AI)
* Core Capabilities (Data, IoT, AI & Automation)
* Key Scenarios (Smart Factory, Supply Chain, Maintenance, Sustainability)
* Business Outcomes, Implementation & Q&A

**[Register Today](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/microsoft-ai-for-manufacturing?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes&utm_term_product=vendor_microsoft)** and secure your spot - See You in the Masterclass!!

name: AI Prompt Engineering Masterclass: Skills, Strategies & Business Impact
description:
**[AI Prompt Engineering Masterclass: Skills, Strategies & Business Impact](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/ai-prompt-engineering-masterclass-skills-strategies-business-impact?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_campaign=aicerts_fy26_q2&utm_content=master_classes&utm_term=at)**
AI is only as powerful as the prompts behind it and mastering this skill is quickly becoming a competitive advantage. Prompt engineering is transforming how professionals interact with AI to drive faster, smarter, and more accurate outcomes.
Join us for a high-impact 2 hours live session to learn how effective prompting can elevate your productivity, improve decision-making, and unlock real business value.
Date: Tue, May 12, 2026
Time: 12 PM - 2 PM EST
Save Your Seat - [Register Now](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/ai-prompt-engineering-masterclass-skills-strategies-business-impact?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_campaign=aicerts_fy26_q2&utm_content=master_classes&utm_term=at)
In this session, you’ll learn:
The fundamentals of prompt engineering and why it matters in 2026
Proven strategies to get better, faster, and more reliable AI outputs
Real-world business use cases across functions like marketing, IT, and leadership
Common risks, mistakes, and best practices to follow
Skills you need to stay ahead in an AI-driven workplace
Whether you're a business leader, IT professional, or AI enthusiast, this session will equip you with practical techniques to maximize the impact of AI in your work.
[Reserve your free spot now, limited seats available!](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/ai-prompt-engineering-masterclass-skills-strategies-business-impact?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_campaign=aicerts_fy26_q2&utm_content=master_classes&utm_term=at)

name: Agentic AI on Vertex: Unlock self-learning AI with Vertex AI
description:
As AI rapidly evolves, organizations are moving beyond static models toward **agentic systems** that can independently plan, make decisions, and take actions.

This masterclass, *“****[Agentic AI on Vertex: Unlock Self-Learning AI with Vertex AI,](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/agentic-ai-on-vertex-unlock-self-learning-ai-with-vertex-ai?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=event&utm_content=master_classes&utm_term=shubhra)****”* dives into how Google Cloud Vertex AI empowers enterprises to design, deploy, and scale intelligent AI agents.
You’ll gain insights into how these agents leverage large language models, orchestration frameworks, and real-time data to solve complex business challenges, from automation and customer engagement to cybersecurity and operations.

Whether you're exploring AI adoption or scaling existing initiatives, this session will equip you with the knowledge to build impactful, future-ready AI systems.

name: Microsoft AI-Powered Security Masterclass for Nonprofits
description:
Nonprofits today operate in an increasingly complex threat landscape, where protecting sensitive data and maintaining trust is critical. Organizations that adopt intelligent, AI-driven security are better equipped to stay resilient and proactive against evolving risks.
In this LIVE masterclass, discover how Microsoft’s AI-powered security solutions help nonprofits secure identities, manage devices, and protect critical data across Microsoft 365. Learn how AI enables faster threat detection, delivers actionable insights, and automates responses—empowering your organization with end-to-end, intelligent security.
**Date:** May 15, 2026
**Time:** 10AM- 12PM EST
**[Click Here to Register for the Session](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/microsoft-ai-masterclass-for-nonprofits?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes&utm_term_product=vendor_microsoft)**
You’ll gain practical insights, real-world use cases, and
a clear understanding of how to implement AI-driven security across your nonprofit environment. Walk away with actionable strategies to strengthen protection, reduce risks, and ensure secure, resilient operations.
**NOTE: "ALL REGISTRATIONS WILL BE PROVIDED WITH DIGITAL ACHEIVEMENT BADGES ISSUED DIRECTLY FROM MICROSOFT"**
**What you will learn:**

* Introduction & Why Security Matters for Nonprofits
* Understanding the Nonprofit Threat Landscape
* Securing Identities, Devices, and Access with Microsoft
* Data Protection and Compliance in Microsoft 365
* AI-Powered Threat Detection and Response
* Building a Practical Security Plan + Q&A

**[Register Today](https://www.netcomlearning.com/webinar/microsoft-ai-masterclass-for-nonprofits?advid=1196&utm_source=meetup&utm_medium=organic_social&utm_content=master_classes&utm_term_product=vendor_microsoft)** and secure your spot - See You in the Masterclass!!
